summary: Route the composed cookie string to the Cookie request header in client.do() instead of Authorization.
reason: All authenticated alaskaair.com endpoints (SvelteKit __data.json + Atmos Rewards API) read the standard Cookie header. The prior Authorization assignment was silently dropped server-side, so every authenticated command (atmos-rewards, account status, authenticated flight search) was effectively unauthenticated (greptile P1).
